title: athyrium porrectum
intro: Athyrium porrectum, also known as the spreading lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Athyrium porrectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
